entries.title: AI Gets a Seat at the Kitchen Table
entries.summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) has become synonymous with workplace productivity, helping employees summarize meetings, write code and automate repetitive tasks. But Sarah Dooley believes one of AI’s most important consumer applications is emerging somewhere much closer to home. Families are beginning to use AI to manage the invisible work that keeps households running, from planning meals […]

entries.title: Companies Trust AI’s Advice but Not Its Actions
entries.summary: Companies are using artificial intelligence across more of their operations than ever while trusting it less to act on its own. The PYMNTS Intelligence report “Wholesale Writes the AI Playbook: How Goods Firms Are Scaling Intelligence Across the Enterprise” found that every wholesale firm, 90% of retailers and 85% of construction firms limit AI agents […] The post Companies Trust AI’s Advice

entries.title: Microsoft Spends $2.5 Billion on Customer AI Deployments
entries.summary: Microsoft will spend $2.5 billion on a new unit aimed at helping its customers implement artificial intelligence (AI). The Microsoft Frontier Company, announced Thursday (July 2), will also embed 6,000 industry and engineering experts with the tech giant’s customers in what it calls a step above what is known as “forward deployed engineering” (FDE). “The […] The post Microsoft Spends $2.5 Bi

entries.title: 47% of Retail Investors Put China Ahead of US in AI Race, eToro Survey Finds
entries.summary: Retail investors now view China as slightly better positioned than the United States to lead the global artificial intelligence race, according to a new survey by trading platform eToro. The latest Retail Investor Beat survey, based on responses from 11,000 retail investors across 13 countries, found that 47% selected China as the country best positioned to lead the AI race, compared with 46% for

entries.title: Visa launches threat intelligence platform; carries out agentic transactions in Europe
entries.summary: Visa has launched a platform designed to help financial institutions detect and respond to cyber threats. Separately, the payments giant has carried out a host of agentic commerce transactions with banks across Europe.

entries.title: Amazon Ready to Launch Satellite Broadband Service This Year
entries.summary: Amazon has enough satellites in orbit to begin rolling out Amazon Leo, the company’s broadband service, Bloomberg reported Thursday (July 2). The company gained another 29 satellites, bringing the total deployment to more than 390, when a United Launch Alliance rocket delivered them into orbit, according to the report. The report cited a post on X in which Chris Weber, vice president of business [

entries.title: Infinite and Sardine launch two-way integration
entries.summary: Infinite, the AI-native compliance and payments platform built for the stablecoin economy, and Sardine, the fraud, risk, and payments platform, today announced a two-way integration that combines Sardine's real-time fraud and risk intelligence with Infinite's AI-powered compliance platform and account infrastructure.

entries.title: Prediction Markets Top $50B Monthly Volume. Will It Last Beyond the World Cup?
entries.summary: Prediction markets surpassed $50 billion in monthly trading volume for the first time in June, with activity jumping 75% from May, according to Artemis data. The milestone coincided with the FIFA World Cup, making June as much a test of event-driven demand as a new market record. Kalshi remained the largest venue, recording roughly $33 billion in monthly volume. Polymarket processed $14 billion co

entries.title: How a Second Generation of Traditional Rails are Matching Client Expectation
entries.summary: Joining FinextraTV at EBADay 2026 in Copenhagen, Amedeo Gallina, Global Head of International Payment Offer, Cash Management, BNP Paribas discussed some of the considerations for traditional rails, in order to retain their relevancy. Gallina described traditional rails as still crucial for the future of payments, with notes on the need to improve on client experience and ability to match G20 ambit

entries.title: Anchorage Digital integrates with Lido to expand institutional access to Ethereum liquid staking
entries.summary: Anchorage Digital, home to America's first federally regulated crypto bank, has integrated with Lido, the largest liquid staking protocol on Ethereum, giving institutions compliant access to wstETH without leaving the Anchorage Digital platform.

entries.title: Ondo Finance launches custodial tokenised securities in the US
entries.summary: Ondo Finance today announced the first live solution of third-party tokenized U.S. securities operating entirely within the existing regulatory perimeter in the U.S., in partnership with Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc., (NYSE: BR) to provide full voting rights for tokenized equity holders.
